title: Number Widget Calculations
excerpt: I’d like the ability to use number widgets to make further calculations. I’d like to have a widget that can pull data from 2 or more number widgets for simple calculations (+/-/*).

posts.author: DrewM (Drew)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d like the ability to use number widgets to make further calculations. I’d like to have a widget that can pull data from 2 or more number widgets for simple calculations (+/-/*).
